sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; export default function NfcBusinessCard(){ const navigate = useNavigate(); function onOrder(e){ // Redirect to external Blinq onboarding URL with the query params requested and optional plan const plan = e?.currentTarget?.dataset?.plan || 'essential'; const url = `https://dash.blinq.me/onboarding/accessory/customize?ref_platform=webflow&ref_page=nfc&ref_platform=webflow&ref_path=%2Fnfc-business-card&ref_cta=order_my_card&plan=${encodeURIComponent(plan)}`; window.location.href = url; } return (

Smart NFC Business Card

A modern NFC-enabled business card that shares your dynamic profile with a tap.

How it works

  • Tap the card with a phone to open your profile
  • Works on iOS & Android without an app
  • Reusable & updateable — change content anytime

Design examples

Essential
$29
  • Single NFC card
  • Standard printing
  • 1 URL programmed
Infinite
$59
  • Premium finish
  • Unlimited URL edits
  • Priority support
Custom
Contact
  • Custom design
  • Team discounts
  • Dedicated onboarding

Pricing

Starting at $29 for a single card. Discounts for teams.

Request a card
); }
